input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.9.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            rule F.9.1.1: Any portion of the Fuel System that is less than 350 mm above the ground, and all parts of the
F.9.1.1 Any portion of the Fuel System that is less than 350 mm above the ground, and all parts of the 
Fuel Tank, must be inside the Primary Structure (F.1.10).

final_answer: Any portion of the Fuel System that is less than 350 mm above the ground, and all parts of the Fuel Tank, must be inside the Primary Structure (F.1.10).
